Matches.Description: The 1st ODI of the  Sri Lanka Tour of West Indies 2026 marks the start of a three match Odi series. Watch West Indies vs Sri Lanka 1st Odi live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked white-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, West Indies will look to make the most of home conditions with a well-balanced squad, while Sri Lanka aim to challenge with a disciplined unit capable of competing in all aspects of the game. Both teams will be eager to gain an early advantage in the series.

The 1st Test of the New Zealand Tour of England 2026 marks the start of a three match Test series. Watch England vs New Zealand 1st Test live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked red-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, England cricket team focusing on balance and pace control. New Zealand, led by Tom Latham, rely on experienced players such as Kane Williamson & Devon Conway to apply early pressure and dominate key phases.

The 3rd ODI of the Australia Tour of Pakistan 2026 marks the start of a three-match Odi series. Watch Pakistan vs Australia 3rd Odi live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked white-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, Pakistan cricket team featuring Babar Azam and Shaheen Afridi focusing on balance and pace control. Australia, led by Mitchell Marsh, rely on experienced players such as Adam Zampa & Matt Short to apply early pressure and dominate key phases.
